content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Sonya and Matrix Beauty". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1080/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The next n lines contain n integers each, representing the matrix.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of operations required to make the matrix beautiful.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use BFS to traverse the matrix and find the minimum number of operations required to make the matrix beautiful.
